coleam00/context-engineering-intro ·GitHub ⭐ 12726 Python · Context-Engineering, AI-Coding, Best-Practices, Prompt-Engineering, Software-Engineering

What it is

A philosophical guide highlighting best practices for structuring documentation and metadata contexts tailored exclusively for maximizing outputs from LLM coding assistants.

Problems solved

  • Precisely how to transition away from unstructured prompting (Vibe coding) towards meticulously formatted context injections fundamentally reducing AI hallucinations and logic drift.

How to get started

Clone the repository to utilize its foundational .md templates (e.g., CLAUDE.md, INITIAL.md). Describe a feature explicitly inside INITIAL.md and execute /generate-prp inside Claude to establish algorithmic blueprints.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

This repository is a pedagogical template explicitly intended to enforce rigorous Software Engineering disciplines natively applied to interacting with sophisticated CLI AI agents (like Claude Code and Cursor).

2. Pain Points & Advantages

"Prompt engineering" focuses excessively on sentence structures; "Context Engineering" encapsulates environment awareness. Providing rigorous templates detailing exact architectural references effectively guarantees zero-shot accuracy drastically minimizing expensive iteration loops during AI development natively.

3. Technical Architecture

A template-based architectural schema integrating custom Claude Code execution rules interacting natively with defined .md constraints establishing boundaries directly onto Model Context Protocol logic processing instances.

4. Core Implementation

Functionality manifests natively using Claude's configuration paths (.claude/commands). Using parameters explicitly configured referencing INITIAL.md structural formats generates (Product Requirements Prompts) guaranteeing AI's meticulously study existing Git file system heuristics evaluating architecture components prior to generating operational code natively.

5. Code Organization

Structured identically to a prototypical root directory holding essential markdown files alongside /PRPs representing structured generated implementations complementing local /examples serving efficiently as concrete reference structures exclusively.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Incorporate INITIAL_EXAMPLE.md directly adapting strictly the sections delineating Examples and Constraints to formulate comprehensive blueprint executions significantly surpassing basic generic output assumptions naturally.

7. Summary

A masterful structural thesis transforming chaotic generative inputs systematically into reproducible, highly reliable engineering specifications radically advancing prompt manipulation theories effectively.
